name: Generate Chart
description: Generate a chart image using Chart.js. Supports line, bar, pie, doughnut, radar, polarArea, bubble, and scatter chart types.

fields.name: data
fields.description: Chart.js data configuration with labels and datasets

fields.name: width
fields.description: Width of the chart in pixels

fields.name: height
fields.description: Height of the chart in pixels

fields.name: output_format
fields.description: Output format for the chart image
